result.summary: The page is mostly usable, but several elements appear clipped or obscured, suggesting horizontal overflow and insufficient spacing around fixed navigation.

issues.description: Multiple horizontal areas are visibly cut off at the right edge, including the top category tab where “Hot Games” appears as “Hot Ga…” and game cards in the rows below. This makes the page look misaligned or wider than the viewport.
issues.suggestion: Ensure horizontal carousels are intentionally scrollable and properly clipped with clear spacing, or adjust card/tab widths so key text and content fit within the viewport.

issues.description: The fixed bottom navigation overlaps the page content. The lower game cards are partially hidden behind the bottom tab bar.
issues.suggestion: Add bottom padding or safe-area spacing to the scrollable content equal to the height of the fixed bottom navigation.

issues.description: Carousel arrows on the promotional banner sit very close to the screen edges and appear partially clipped, especially the left arrow.
issues.suggestion: Inset the carousel controls slightly from the viewport edges so they are fully visible and easier to tap.

issues.description: The top navigation/category row has inconsistent visible content: the search icon tile is fully visible, but later category chips are truncated, making the row feel unfinished.
issues.suggestion: Use a consistent horizontal scroll treatment with adequate padding at the start and end, and avoid cutting labels mid-word where possible.
